name: zotero-citations
description: Live in-text citations + auto References from Zotero (pandoc + citeproc, any CSL style) plus a custom chronological Legislation & case-law list that CSL cannot express. Also fixes mis-rendering Zotero items via direct DB edits, offers an ask-first OCR overlay for scanned PDFs, and memoizes PDF text extraction as a Zotero child note.
